package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"io"
)

// scenario for json_number_vs_float64_decode: `json.Unmarshal` into `map[string]any` for numeric data without `UseNumber()`
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule609NegativeRecord struct { Name string `json:"name"`; Count int `json:"count"` }

func scenario609Negative(writer io.Writer, value Rule609NegativeRecord) error {
	return json.NewEncoder(writer).Encode(value)
}
